title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾（🦞）为标志，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随用户成长而发展的智能体项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: ultraworkers/claw-code
content: An agent-managed museum exhibit, built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex — developed and maintained with no human intervention.
summary: 一个由智能体管理的博物馆展品，使用 Rust 和 Gajae-Code / LazyCodex 构建，完全无需人工干预开发和维护。

built in Rust with Gajae-Code / LazyCodex
developed and maintained with no human intervention

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities.
Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: ollama/ollama

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.

title: AI Learns the "Dark Art" of RF Chip Design

title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
content: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

highlights: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol
stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity
most advanced safety stack

title: How agents are transforming work
content: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
summary: OpenAI的研究论文展示了AI代理如何通过处理更长、更复杂的任务来改变工作方式，并提升各角色的生产力。
highlights: AI agents are transforming work
enabling longer, more complex tasks
expanding productivity across roles

title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
summary: 本文介绍如何通过一条命令在Hugging Face Jobs上运行vLLM服务器，简化了部署流程。
highlights: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
通过一条命令在Hugging Face Jobs上运行vLLM服务器

title: Which tokens does a hybrid model predict better?
summary: 该博客探讨了混合模型在预测不同token时的表现差异，分析了哪些token类型（如常见词、罕见词、语法词等）在混合架构下预测更准确，并提供了实验数据和结论。
highlights: 混合模型在预测罕见token时表现优于单一模型。
实验表明，语法功能词（如冠词、介词）的预测准确率提升显著。
常见高频词的预测差异较小，但混合模型仍略有优势。
